channel.title: Comments for page "Dr. Isabel Helga Anastasia Parvati Wondertainment, V is Displeased With Her Happy Meal"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Dr. Isabel Helga Anastasia Parvati Wondertainment, V is Displeased With Her Happy Meal"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It was supposed to be a case of her doing something selfish and having to pay for it (in the scp). But I can see where you are comong from, since aismallard had a similar thought. Sadly we did not have the time to adress that.

Thank you for reading!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It's been a while since I read her tales, so I could be wrong, but this feels kind of… too malicious and calculating for Isabel. It doesn't quite read like she's actually creating the toy to be fun and accidentally/naively doing harm, which I would buy, or her just being childishly self-centered. It mostly just feels like she's doing something bad for her own benefit.

Edit: I don't mind new takes on characters, especially ones that may not have been in circulation, but this doesn't feel like a positive evolution.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yeah, sadly there was simply not time to work in the structural and dialogue changes. Again, thank you for the critique either way!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: While this definitely has improvements over the draft, I still feel the basic structure and plot have issues that made it hard for me to enjoy this. I'm going to -1 for that, but I do appreciate that making the changes required in the amount of time the contest provided would require a Herculean effort.

item.title: Re: Author post
item.content:encoded:
Man what a wild ride. Right at the start i lose electricity and Devon just continues anyway like the champ he is. Was only able to use my ohone for the entire duration. Was super fun to work with him though and I am proud we managed to finish it!

More by these authors: http://www.scp-wiki.net/devons-den
http://www.scp-wiki.net/poi-3181-198-file

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"I barely got back there in time to stop Elwynn"

…

You named a unicorn after my otherkin?1

… +1.

Footnotes
1. I know it's probably a coincindence.

item.title: Author post
item.content:encoded:
This was a journey to write. Crashington lost electricity a couple days in, but like the baller he is, he refused to give up. It was a bit unorthodox, but we found a way to keep collaborating. It was a blast working with him, though. I'm super proud we managed to pull it off!

Thanks to TheMightyMcB for providing some much-needed crit- aismallard as well.

Dr. Wondertainment logo lovingly borrowed from the Doctor Wondertainment Hub. The image containing it was created by me.

Ambrose Restaurants menu CSS comes from the Ambrose Restaurants Hub.
